---
title: "About"
image: "IMG_1499.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dominic-sander-a55959338/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/dsander04
---

Recent Statistics graduate specializing in data analysis, statistical modeling, and applied machine learning.

Experienced in R and Python for data cleaning, analysis, and visualization, with a strong interest in sports analytics and turning data into clear, data-driven conclusions.

Actively seeking entry-level Data Analyst or Statistician roles.
